text: Very interesting stuff. Have been thinking about something like this my self as well. The author has another interesting video. The interesting stuff starts at this timestamp: <https://youtu.be/l0GfMs82PvU?t=1421>

text: I follow this project on Mastodon, but haven't been able to justify a new device in the last couple of years..

text: I really like the spirit of the project, but have no direct experience with the gear. (And, like <@UCUSW7WVD>, am not in the market for a laptop atm).
